info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: prAyeRAyamANapUrvaka eva prayujyate  ' aByAsaH = pAramparyeRa vfttiH ' iti kzIrasvAmI

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'haviSSezAn saMplomnAya piRqAnkftvA' (Apa0 SrO0 84166) samplomnAya=sampramfdya ralayoraviSezaH nalopaSCAndasaH
'tvAmAmananti prakftiM puruzArTapravartinIm' (ku0 213) Amananti udAharanti nigacCanti nigamayanti
'evaM hi sUtrakArA Amananti' (mAlatI0 7) Amananti upadeSaM paramparIRaM saMsmaranti pUrvAnukAntamanuSAsati
'samO hi SizwErAmnAtO vartsyantAvAmayaH sa (SatruH) ca' (SiSu0 210) samO tulyO kaTitO varDizyamARo rogaH SatruSca
'Amananmantramuttamam' (Bawwi0 1730) Amanan kaRWe kurvan aDIyAno vA AvfttyA paWanniti vA
'treyaRApi nivartante sidDyA pratizeDena pratyAmnAyena' (BA0 SrO0 6156) pratyAmnAyaH pratyAdeSaH Adizwasya punarAdeSena nivartanam

'yadyanAQyo'gnInAdaDIta kAmamevEkAM gAM dadyAtsA gavAM pratyAmnAyo Bavati' (Apa0 SrO0 562018) gavAM pratyAmnAyo bahvInAM gavAM dAnasya nivartikA Bavati na raTAdInanyajAtIyAnnivartayatIti BAzyam gavAM pratyAmnAya iti vacanAdanyat sarvaM dAtavyamiti rudradattaH
